browse.title: Products

home.metaDescription: Atlas is a product and user management platform. Browse the catalogue, manage products, and administer users with secure role-based access.
home.heroHeading: Manage your products and users in one coherent system.
home.heroSubheading: Browse a fast public catalogue, give admins full management tools, and keep everything secure — in light and dark, on desktop and mobile.
home.feature1Body: Administrators manage the catalogue and users; regular users browse — enforced on every API request, not just the UI.
home.feature2Body: Products sync from an external source with timeouts, retries and graceful fallback to cached data when it's slow or down.
home.feature3Body: Argon2id password hashing, rotating JWT sessions, validated uploads, and rate-limited APIs.
home.feature4Body: A versioned REST API and framework-agnostic core, ready to power web, Android and iOS from the same backend.

about.metaDescription: About Atlas — a product and user management platform built with a secure, mobile-ready architecture.
about.heading: About Atlas
about.paragraph1: Atlas is a product and user management platform. It pairs a fast, SEO-friendly public catalogue with a secure administration area where teams manage products and users.
about.paragraph2: The system is built around a clean, layered architecture: a versioned REST API backed by a framework-agnostic service layer, so the same core logic can power the web app today and native mobile apps tomorrow without a rewrite.
about.paragraph3: Security is a first-class concern — strong password hashing, rotating sessions, validated file uploads, and rate-limited endpoints protect user data and the platform itself.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Atlas team.
contact.heading: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions about Atlas? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
contact.successToast: Thanks — your message has been received. We'll be in touch.
contact.errorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again.

legal.privacyMetaDescription: How Atlas collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
legal.privacySection1Body: When you register we collect your name, email address(es), phone number(s), and an optional profile photo and bio. We store a one-way hash of your password — never the password itself.
legal.privacySection2Body: Your data is used solely to provide the service: authentication, displaying your profile, and contacting you about your account. We do not sell personal data.
legal.privacySection3Body: Passwords are hashed with Argon2id, sessions use short-lived rotating tokens, traffic is served over HTTPS, and access to personal data is restricted by role.
legal.privacySection4Body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us via the contact page.
legal.termsMetaDescription: The terms governing your use of the Atlas platform.
legal.termsIntro: By creating an account or using Atlas you agree to these terms. This is a demonstration application built for a technical assessment.
legal.termsSection1Body: You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to access data you are not authorized to, or disrupt the platform for other users.
legal.termsSection2Body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure. Administrative capabilities are limited to authorized administrator accounts.
legal.termsSection3Body: The service is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind.
